title: Muthal murai unnai Lyrics Thulli Ezhunthathu Kadhal Songs lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: BOBO Shashi
Song: Muthal Murai Unnai
Lyrics : Saka Senthilkumar

Movie: Thulli Ezhunthathu Kadhal
Music: BOBO Shashi

Muthal murai unnai ninaithu
en kangal azhuginrathe..azhuginrathe
Adhu natpu enru therindhum
en nenjam marukinradhe..marukinradhe
Thanimayil intha thanimayil
un mathipinai therinthu konden
Ulagathil en ulagathil
un velicham elandhu ninren

Vidaigalae illaa vidukadhai pol
kaadhalukum vilakkam kidaiyaadhe
Udalai uyir vittu pirindhaalum
ninaivugal endrenrum aliyaathe
Kaadhal enra bodhaiyile
oodalgal koodalgal irandum undu
Natpu enra paathaiyile
athil varuthamum valigalum marapathundu

Muthal murai unnai ninaithu
en kangal azhuginrathe
Adhu natpu enru therindhum
en nenjam marukinradhe

Alaiyaai karaiyai thaedi vandhaal
kalangiya kangalai yaar thudaipaar
kanalaai kodhikum nerupinai pol
karugiya ivan kathai yaar mudithaar
Desam thaandi paranthaalum
paravaigal paasathai marapathillai
kaneer vittu azhudhaalum
kadal meengalin sogangal therivathillai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Muthal Murai Unnai?

The song Muthal Murai Unnai expresses deep feelings of love and longing, portraying the emotional turmoil of missing someone special.

What is the plot context of the movie Thulli Ezhunthathu Kadhal?

Thulli Ezhunthathu Kadhal revolves around the complexities of love and relationships, highlighting the struggles and joys faced by the characters.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Bobo Shashi, who is also the music director, showcasing his talent in both singing and composing.

When was Muthal Murai Unnai released?

The song Muthal Murai Unnai was released on November 7, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Muthal Murai Unnai, the protagonist reflects on the bittersweet feelings of love and separation. The song beautifully captures the essence of longing, as the lyrics convey a deep emotional connection to a loved one. Set against the backdrop of Thulli Ezhunthathu Kadhal, it enhances the narrative of love's complexities. With its soothing melody and heartfelt delivery by Bobo Shashi, the song evokes a sense of nostalgia and yearning.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Muthal Murai Unnai from Thulli Ezhunthathu Kadhal is a mesmerizing romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Bobo Shashi's soulful voice and heartfelt lyrics by Saka Senthilkumar, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the beauty of love. Dive into this enchanting track that beautifully blends emotion and melody, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Thinking of you for the first time makes my eyes tear up.. it tears up. Even if I realize that it's friendship, my heart is still troubled.. it is troubled. In this loneliness, I understood your importance. In my world, your light shines bright.

Love cannot be explained like a story without endings. Even if the body separates from the soul, memories will never fade away. In the thought of love, there are both conflicts and resolutions. In the path of friendship, there are both sorrows and joys that are forgotten.
Thinking of you for the first time makes my eyes tear up. Even if I realize that it's friendship, my heart is still troubled.

If you search for the waves, who will see the troubled eyes? Like a flame that burns with anger, who will tell this story? Even if you cross the country, the love for birds will never fade. Even if tears fall, the sorrows of the sea fish will not be revealed.
It is tearing up.. it is troubled..
